channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI skills salary hack: prompt engineers vs ML infra
item.description: Prompt engineers make USD 150k while ML infra engineers make USD 195k in 2026. See the exact skills, benchmarks, and infra tasks that move the needle — plus the mistake that cost one team USD 8.4k.

item.title: Push live updates cheaper without WebSockets
item.description: Cut real-time update latency 60% without WebSockets — SNS+Lambda+WebSocket vs SSE vs polling benchmarks (2026).

item.title: Salary boosters: Python vs SQL vs AI in 2026
item.description: Cut AI cloud costs 92% by moving vector search from Python to DuckDB — latency, salary data, and the exact benchmark I ran in 2026.

item.title: AI tools that made non-CS side projects prod-ready
item.description: Ship a real product in hours — the 3 AI-powered tools non-traditional developers use to go from 'it works on my machine' to production in 2026

item.title: Ship production, not stars
item.description: A production-style incident report, a load-tested REST API, and a write-up of how you debugged a race condition under load beat 1,000 empty repository…

item.title: Max pool size isn't about CPU
item.description: In practice, I've seen teams set their pool size to 20 connections for a 100-connection database, only to watch their API response times climb from 45ms…

item.title: RAG in prod: what tutorials never mention
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 79% and GPU costs 67% with Redis caching, vector index tuning, and embedding model swap — the mistakes most tutorials don’t mention.

item.title: Do you need a vector DB?
item.description: Cut vector search latency 60% with PostgreSQL pgvector 0.7 — benchmark numbers, infra cost, and the one query you must run before switching to a dedicated vector store

item.title: Choose the Right Realtime Protocol Fast
item.description: Pick realtime tool in minutes: SSE, WebSockets, or polling — concrete latency, cost, and CPU numbers for 2026 workloads

item.title: Simple code beats complex architecture
item.description: Cut API response time 97% and infra costs 94% by removing over-engineering. Learn the exact steps teams waste months on in 2026.

item.title: Pay your rent: remote salary calculator 2026
item.description: Turn a 'market rate' into a livable salary when you're in a lower-cost country — with a free calculator, negotiation emails, and real 2026 fee data for Wise, Payoneer, and Deel.

item.title: Pick Arc over Toptal in 2026
item.description: Arc beats Andela and Toptal in 2026 payout speed and net earnings—median 5-day approval vs 14 and 23 days, 10 % fee vs 15–27 %, and $47 vs $35 effective hourly rate after cuts.

item.title: Misconfigured pool size kills prod
item.description: Cut database connection timeouts 80% with the right pool size formula — why CPU cores × 2 + 1 fails and what to use instead with PostgreSQL 16 and Node.js 20 LTS examples.

item.title: AI skills that move the $185k paycheck
item.description: Cut AI salary research time by 70% with 2026 data — prompt engineering vs vector search: concrete benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and hiring signals that actually move the needle.

item.title: AI coding wave: non-trads ship real products
item.description: Ship a production product in 2026 with AI tools that actually work. 45% latency drop, $120/month bill, and 8-hour setup time — the exact tools non-traditional devs use to go from prototype to profit.

item.title: Get $120k remote salary from US firms
item.description: Get $120k remote salary from US firms — salary data, scripts, and negotiation templates to close the gap from lower-cost countries in 2026.

item.title: Choose push tech that won’t break prod
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with WebSocket push — RAM, CPU and cost numbers for WebSockets vs SSE vs polling in 2026

item.title: Scale kills RAG pipelines fast
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 12× and costs 6× with pre-computed embeddings in RedisSearch 2.8. Benchmarks, code, and the mistakes most tutorials miss.

item.title: Ship African portfolios that clear remote screens
item.description: Build a remote portfolio that passes recruiter bots in under 90 seconds — Docker size ≤ 200 MB, cost bound, and one verifiable SLO. 2026 hiring numbers and real repo examples included.

item.title: Cellular backends: what changes with 5G users
item.description: Cut mobile API latency 60% — connection pool tuning, HTTP/3, Redis TTLs, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.
